analysis.test: Art. 1240 C. civ.: three cumulative requirements — (1) fault (characterized disloyal/parasitic acts), (2) actual and ascertainable harm in both its existence and extent, (3) direct causal link. With respect to parasitism (parasitisme), the harm consisting of undue savings on investment corresponds to the R&D, manufacturing, promotional, and commercialization expenditures that the wrongdoer spares itself by free-riding on another party's work; moral harm is necessarily inferred from the disloyal acts once the wrongdoer is shown to have profited from another's goodwill and reputation without making the corresponding investments (Adverse Exhibit 25, Cass. com. 9 juin 2021).
analysis.faits: Méridian Studios has set forth documented investments: purchase order […] 2 dated July 24, 2018 (Exhibit 7), commercialization on Amazon (Exhibit 6 Bis), registration of trademark Bastille No. 4449595 (Exhibit 2), and promotion of the physical game. Julien Mercier exploits Tohu-Bohu, a mobile application incorporating the content of Bastille, without having incurred those investments. The attestation of certified public accountant Camille Lefèvre 3 records the variations in Bastille sales for 2020/2021 on Amazon and at […]. The file 'Manque A Gagner Méridian Studios.xlsx' has been submitted into evidence, but its extraction is blank (⚠ exhibit not read). Opposing Exhibit 25 (Cass. com. 9 juin 2021) itself acknowledges that non-economic (moral) damages may be inferred from acts of unfair competition where the wrongdoer free-rides on another party's goodwill and reputation without having made the corresponding investments.
analysis.faille: Two evidentiary deficiencies: (1) failure to extract the file 'Manque A Gagner Méridian Studios.xlsx', thereby depriving Méridian Studios of its primary quantified proof of the quantum of damages; (2) absence of documentary showing of the substitutability of Tohu-Bohu/Bastille and of the direct causal link between […] the exploitation of Tohu-Bohu and the decline in Bastille sales (temporal correlation not established; no download/usage data for Tohu-Bohu provided).
analysis.riposte: (a) The presumption of non-economic (moral) harm is established upon the characterization of the acts of unfair competition, without any need to demonstrate a decline in sales (adverse Exhibit 25 itself); (b) the harm consisting in undue savings on investment is autonomous from commercial harm: it corresponds to the expenditures incurred by Méridian Studios that Julien Mercier avoided, irrespective of any market substitutability; (c) Cass. com. of 29 November 1976 [1] holds that trial judges […] who impose liability for unfair competition establish, without reversing the burden of proof, the existence of the causal link […] between the wrongdoing and the harm, once the acts of unfair competition have been characterized; (d) Cass. com. of 15 January 2020 [2] reverses the denial of damages based on the absence of proof of actual harm where the unlawful practices have been established.
analysis.pourquoi: The primary quantified evidence (xlsx file) is unreadable/unusable. The certified public accountant's affidavit establishes sales variations but does not demonstrate that those variations are caused by Tohu-Bohu rather than by other factors (COVID, general competition, product life cycle). The causal link between […] the exploitation of Tohu-Bohu and the decline in Bastille sales is not independently documented.

autorites.title: Cass. com. 75-12.431, 1976-11-29
themes: lien de causalité avec la faute
autorites.summary: Les juges du fond […] prononcent une condamnation à […] des dommages-intérêts pour concurrence déloyale, établissent, sans renverser la charge de la preuve, l'existence d'un lien de causalité […] la faute et le préjudice dès lors qu'ils constatent la corrélation […] l'installation concurrente et la diminution du chiffre d'affaires du commerçant et écartent formellement d'autres causes de la baisse du chiffre d'affaires.

autorites.title: Cass. com. 17-27.778, 2020-01-15
themes: octroi de délais de paiement illicites et de prêts en méconnaissance du monopole bancaire
autorites.summary: Prive sa décision de base légale la cour d'appel […], pour rejeter la […] en paiement de dommages-intérêts d'une société pour faits de concurrence déloyale, retient que les pratiques illicites alléguées n'ont pas été mises en oeuvre dans le cadre d'une stratégie d'éviction et qu'aucun lien n'est établi […] ces pratiques et le préjudice invoqué, sans rechercher, alors qu'il s'infère nécessairement un préjudice d'un acte de concurrence déloyale, si l'octroi de délais de paiement illicites et de prêts en méconnaissance du monopole bancaire n'avait pas pour effet d'avantager déloyalement les franchisés d'une société au détriment des franchisés de la société concurrente, et de porter ainsi atteinte à la rentabilité et à l'attractivité de son réseau

analysis.acte_referme: (1) Proper extraction and production of the file 'Manque A Gagner Méridian Studios.xlsx' with certification by the certified public accountant […]; (2) bailiff's report (procès-verbal de constat) or certified capture of download/rating data for Tohu-Bohu on […] (Carto Royale 2/[…] Play) with temporal correlation to the declines in Bastille sales; (3) […] compelled disclosure of Tohu-Bohu's exploitation data (advertising revenues, number of active users) by way of a pre-trial discovery order (mesure d'instruction) pursuant to Art. 145 CPC.
analysis.moyen_adverse: Julien Mercier will contest the existence of certain harm and a causal link: Tohu-Bohu is a free/freemium mobile application targeting a different audience from the physical board game Bastille, the markets are not substitutable, and the decline in Bastille sales is explained by exogenous factors (COVID, saturation of the party-game market, competition from Carto Royale 4/Bluff & Cie). He will invoke the absence of any serious quantification and the insufficiency of the accounting attestation.
analysis.these_adverse: Julien Mercier argues, relying on Opposing Exhibit 25 (Cass. com. 9 juin 2021) from which he draws an a contrario inference, that quantified economic damages must be proven as to their quantum and that the certified public accountant's attestation […] is insufficient to establish a causal link between Tohu-Bohu and the decline in Bastille sales. He contends that the xlsx file, not having been produced, deprives Méridian Studios of any serious quantified proof, and that the markets for the physical board game and the mobile application are distinct, thereby precluding any substitutability and, consequently, any direct commercial harm. He may further invoke Opposing Exhibit 27 (CA Paris, […] c. Tripotoly) to emphasize that even in cases of established direct competition, damages must be individualized and proven.

pieces_adverses.piece: Tohu-Bohu download data showing a marginal audience or a distinct user base (young users/mobile vs. adults/physical board game)
pieces_adverses.contre: Irrelevant: the harm consisting in undue savings on investment is independent of the size of the opposing party's audience; substitutability is not required to establish parasitism (unfair competition by free-riding)

pieces_adverses.piece: Bastille sales figures predating Tohu-Bohu showing a pre-existing or COVID-related downward trend
pieces_adverses.contre: Contest through the temporal correlation […] the launch of Tohu-Bohu and the acceleration of the decline; the non-economic harm and the harm from undue savings subsist independently of the commercial trend

pieces_adverses.piece: Affidavit or quotation demonstrating that Julien Mercier developed Tohu-Bohu independently (his own development costs)
pieces_adverses.contre: Unavailing: parasitism (free-riding) does not require slavish copying but rather the exploitation of another party's work and investments; the interface development costs do not offset the savings realized on the content.

pieces_attendues: Certified and attested extraction of the file 'Manque A Gagner Méridian Studios.xlsx' with certification by the certified public accountant […]
Download/active-user data for Tohu-Bohu (Carto Royale 2/[…] Play) with temporal correlation to Bastille sales figures
Invoices and supporting documentation for Méridian Studios' investments (R&D, manufacturing […] 2, marketing campaigns, Amazon search-engine optimization)
Pre-trial discovery order (mesure d'instruction) pursuant to Art. 145 CPC for compelled disclosure of Tohu-Bohu's revenues and exploitation data
